product_overview: OKVE is a React component library and documentation site for building and testing interactive knowledge graph experiences from static JSON sample data. The site provides a marketing homepage with a live preview, a hands-on demo playground for layouts and export, and browsable documentation with examples and API reference.
core_goals: Discover the product and copy the install command to begin using the library
Explore interactive knowledge graph layouts and inspect node details in a live demo
Export visual snapshots of graphs as PNG for sharing or documentation
Read installation instructions, API reference, and usage examples in the documentation
See a live preview of the graph on the marketing homepage without any backend

features.name: Homepage overview and quick start
features.description: Introduce the product, show a live KnowledgeGraph preview, provide copy-to-clipboard install instructions, and link to docs and the repository.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe live KnowledgeGraph preview in the hero area
Navigate to / -> Hover over the hero visual to observe parallax motion
Navigate to / -> Copy the install command to clipboard using the terminal copy control
Navigate to / -> Activate the Get Started action to open the docs at /docs/getting-started
Navigate to / -> Open the project repository in a new tab to view source

features.name: Interactive demo playground
features.description: Allow users to experiment with multiple graph layouts, select and inspect nodes by group, customize tooltip fields, and export the current graph as a PNG snapshot.
user_flows: Navigate to /demo -> Switch to the force layout to see nodes settle under force simulation
Navigate to /demo -> Switch to the radial layout to see nodes arranged radially
Navigate to /demo -> Switch to the arc layout to see the arc-style layout applied
Navigate to /demo -> Switch to the chord layout to see chord relationships visualized
Navigate to /demo -> Select a node group chip to filter and highlight nodes by group
Navigate to /demo -> Toggle node tooltip fields, edge tooltip fields, and metadata keys to change tooltip content
Navigate to /demo -> Select a node in the graph to update and inspect the selected node panel
Navigate to /demo -> Export the current graph as PNG and download the snapshot

features.name: Documentation browser
features.description: Provide a navigable docs site with sidebar navigation, in-page table-of-contents links, code samples, and API prop reference for the KnowledgeGraph components.
user_flows: Navigate to /docs/getting-started -> Read installation and usage guidance for the library
Navigate to /docs/getting-started -> Use the sidebar to navigate to the API reference at /docs/api-reference
Navigate to /docs/api-reference -> Inspect component prop tables and type examples
Navigate to /docs/api-reference -> Follow an in-page table of contents link to jump to a specific section
Navigate to /docs/examples -> Open and read usage examples and copy embedded code snippets
Navigate to /docs/changelog -> Read release notes and version history

features.name: Dark theme initialization
features.description: Apply and persist a dark theme across the site so pages render in dark mode on load.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe that the site renders in dark theme automatically
Navigate to /demo -> Observe that the site renders in dark theme automatically
Navigate to /docs/getting-started -> Observe that the site renders in dark theme automatically

routes.description: Marketing homepage with live graph preview and quick-start actions
Interactive playground for layouts, tooltips, selection, and export
Docs section index that redirects to getting started
Usage examples for layouts, selection, and tooltips

features.name: Homepage overview and quick start
features.description: Presents the product pitch, a live KnowledgeGraph preview, install guidance, and copy-to-clipboard setup instructions.
user_interactions: Click Get Started to enter the docs
Click View on GitHub to open the repository
Click the terminal copy button to copy the install command
Move the pointer across the hero visual to see parallax motion

features.name: Interactive demo playground
features.description: Lets users switch graph layouts, pick nodes by group, tune tooltip fields, inspect the selected node, and export the graph as PNG.
user_interactions: Switch between force, radial, arc, and chord layouts
Select a node from the grouped node chips
Toggle node tooltip fields, edge tooltip fields, and metadata keys
Click Export PNG to download a graph snapshot
Click a node in the graph to update the selected node panel

features.name: Documentation browser
features.description: Provides nested docs pages with a sidebar, in-page section navigation, code samples, and prop tables.
user_interactions: Navigate between docs pages using the sidebar
Follow the on-page table of contents links
Read installation, schema, examples, and changelog content
Copy and inspect embedded code snippets

features.name: Dark theme initialization
features.description: Forces the site into a dark theme on load and persists the selection in localStorage.
user_interactions: Load any page in the site
Observe that the document theme is set automatically

known_limitations.issue: The docs site uses static sample data for the preview and demo instead of a live backend.
known_limitations.impact: Test coverage should focus on UI behavior and local state transitions, not network flows.

known_limitations.issue: The current theme hook forces dark mode on every load instead of letting users switch themes.
known_limitations.impact: Theme behavior is deterministic, but there is no user-facing toggle to test.
